title: haunted house in Monte Cristo most haunted house
publication_or_organisation: The daredevil of Monte Cristo; ABC Conversations / Lawrence Ryan
australian_relation: ABC Conversations public interview describing Monte Cristo Homestead at Junee as Australia's most haunted house.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC Conversations page says Lawrence Ryan grew up in Monte Cristo Homestead at Junee and that it bills itself as Australia's most haunted house; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Monte Cristo Homestead result.
evidence_summary: ABC Conversations said Lawrence Ryan grew up in the famous Victorian-era Monte Cristo Homestead in Junee, country New South Wales. The page says his father restored the burnt-out mansion, the family learnt its history, and it now bills itself as Australia's most haunted house.
